name: io.github.NovadaLabs/novada-mcp
description: Search the web (Google, DuckDuckGo, Yandex), extract any URL, crawl, map, multi-step research, scrape 16 platforms, browser automation, proxy routing — one API key.

tools.name: novada_search
tools.description: Search the web and get clean, ready-to-use content. Returns titles, URLs, snippets — reranked by relevance.

tools.name: novada_extract
tools.description: Extract content from any URL. Handles Cloudflare, DataDome, Kasada automatically via auto-escalation (static → JS render → Browser CDP).

tools.name: novada_crawl
tools.description: Use when you need content from a bounded set of pages (up to 20) and don't have the URLs yet. Crawls BFS or DFS, extracts content from each page inline.

tools.name: novada_research
tools.description: One call → 3-10 parallel searches across Google/Bing/DuckDuckGo → dedup → extract full content from top sources → returns CITED SOURCE MATERIAL (numbered source sections), not a written answer. Extractive, not generative: it gathers and ranks the most relevant passages; YOU compose the final answer from them.

tools.name: novada_map
tools.description: Use when you need to know what URLs exist on a site before deciding what to read. Tries sitemap.xml first (fast), falls back to BFS crawl.

tools.name: novada_site_copy
tools.description: Copy an entire docs site or site section to disk as clean markdown — one .md file per page — and return a COMPACT manifest, not the page bodies. Use when you need a whole knowledge base on disk (offline docs ingest, RAG corpus, full-site mirror).

tools.name: novada_scrape
tools.description: Use when you need structured data from a specific platform — not raw HTML, but clean tabular records. Supports 16 platforms (~87 operations): Amazon, Walmart, SHEIN, Google (incl. Shopping), Bing, DuckDuckGo, Yandex, X/Twitter, TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, YouTube, LinkedIn, GitHub, ChatGPT, Perplexity.

tools.name: novada_scrape_amazon
tools.description: Extract structured Amazon data — product details, reviews, seller info, bestseller lists, and category/brand listings — through an Amazon-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="amazon.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_google
tools.description: Extract structured Google SERP data — organic web search results, AI Mode answers, Maps place/review details, Shopping listings, Jobs, Hotels, and Videos — through a Google-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="google.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_bing
tools.description: Extract structured Bing SERP data — organic web search results, video results, news results, and shopping listings — through a Bing-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="bing.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_duckduckgo
tools.description: Extract structured DuckDuckGo web search SERP data through a DuckDuckGo-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="duckduckgo.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_yandex
tools.description: Extract structured Yandex web search SERP data through a Yandex-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="yandex.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_youtube
tools.description: Extract structured YouTube data — video and channel metadata, transcripts, comments, and downloadable video/audio files — through a YouTube-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="youtube.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_instagram
tools.description: Extract structured Instagram data — profiles, posts, reels, and comments — through an Instagram-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="instagram.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_facebook
tools.description: Extract structured Facebook data — public profile pages, posts, comments, and events — through a Facebook-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="facebook.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_tiktok
tools.description: Extract structured TikTok data — profile info, post/video details, and post lists by profile, hashtag, or search URL — through a TikTok-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="tiktok.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_x
tools.description: Extract structured X (Twitter) data — a single post and profile lookups by username or URL — through an X-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="x.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_walmart
tools.description: Extract structured Walmart data — product details by keyword search, category URL, SKU, zip-code-specific pricing, or direct product URL — through a Walmart-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="walmart.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_shein
tools.description: Extract structured SHEIN product data — product details by product ID or product URL — through a SHEIN-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="shein.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_linkedin
tools.description: Extract structured LinkedIn data — job listings (by location/filters, by a jobs search-results URL, or a single job posting URL) and company profile info by URL — through a LinkedIn-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="linkedin.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_github
tools.description: Extract structured GitHub repository data — repository details by URL, or multiple repositories from a GitHub search-results URL — through a GitHub-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="github.com".

tools.name: novada_scrape_perplexity
tools.description: Extract the actual AI-generated answer Perplexity returns for a query — by a Perplexity query URL or a raw search term — through a Perplexity-only tool with a closed, typed `operation` enum. Same underlying engine as novada_scrape, pinned to platform="perplexity.ai".

tools.name: novada_proxy
tools.description: Use when you need to route your own HTTP requests through residential or mobile IPs — for geo-targeting, IP rotation, or bypassing IP-based rate limits. Returns proxy URL, shell export commands, or curl --proxy flag.

tools.name: novada_verify
tools.description: Use when you have a factual claim and need to check if it's supported by web sources. Runs 3 parallel searches (supporting, skeptical, fact-check angles) and returns a verdict: supported / unsupported / contested / insufficient_data.

tools.name: novada_browser
tools.description: Use when you need to interact with a web page — click buttons, fill forms, scroll, take screenshots, or execute JavaScript. Chain multiple actions in one call for efficiency.

tools.name: novada_discover
tools.description: List all available Novada tools with name, description, category, and status.

tools.name: novada_browser_flow
tools.description: Simplified browser automation with a 5-action flow API (click, scroll, wait, type, screenshot). Use only if you specifically need this simplified flow interface or novada_browser is unavailable.

tools.name: novada_ai_monitor
tools.description: Search PUBLIC indexed pages on AI-company domains for brand mentions and sentiment — this is NOT page-change monitoring (that's novada_monitor) and does NOT query live AI models.

tools.name: novada_monitor
tools.description: Detect changes on a web page over time. Extracts content, computes a hash, compares with previous check.

tools.name: novada_setup
tools.description: The onboarding concierge and first-run front door of the Novada MCP. Call this FIRST when starting out, or whenever a tool reports a missing/invalid key.

tools.name: novada_account
tools.description: Single-call account & billing dashboard. Composes wallet balance, plan balances, capture logs, and health entitlements based on the `section` param.

tools.name: novada_proxy_account_create
tools.description: ⚠️ WRITE — Create a proxy sub-account. Two-step confirm gate.

tools.name: novada_proxy_account_list
tools.description: List proxy sub-accounts. Wraps developer-api POST /v1/proxy_account/list.

tools.name: novada_ip_whitelist
tools.description: Manage IP whitelist for proxy products. Supports add/list/delete/remark for Residential (1), Unlimited (4), and Static ISP (5) products.

tools.name: novada_capture_apikey
tools.description: Get or reset the Capture API key for the account. Wraps POST /v1/capture/get_apikey and /v1/capture/reset_apikey.

tools.name: novada_static_ip_mgmt
tools.description: Manage static ISP IPs on the account. Wraps /v1/static_house/* developer-api endpoints.

tools.name: novada_session_stats
tools.description: Return per-process / per-session usage telemetry: tool-call counts, the last-N calls, and process uptime.

tools.name: novada_search_feedback
tools.description: Record search-result quality so future ranking can learn from it. Returns a thank-you/echo confirmation with an agent_instruction.

prompts.name: research_topic
prompts.description: Deep multi-source research on any topic with optional country and focus constraints

prompts.name: extract_and_summarize
prompts.description: Extract content from one or more URLs and prepare a focused summary

prompts.name: site_audit
prompts.description: Map a website structure then extract and summarize key sections

prompts.name: scrape_platform_data
prompts.description: Scrape structured data from a specific platform (Amazon, Reddit, TikTok, LinkedIn, etc.) using the Novada Scraper API

prompts.name: browser_stateful_workflow
prompts.description: Automate a multi-step browser workflow with persistent session state (login, form submission, paginated scraping)

resources.name: Supported Search Engines
resources.description: List of search engines available in novada_search with characteristics and recommended use cases

resources.name: Supported Country Codes
resources.description: Country codes for geo-targeted search in novada_search. 195 countries supported.

resources.name: Agent Tool Selection Guide
resources.description: Decision tree and workflow patterns for choosing between all 11 novada tools: search, extract, crawl, map, research, proxy, scrape, verify, unblock, browser, health

resources.name: Supported Scraper Platforms
resources.description: Full list of platforms supported by novada_scrape with their operation IDs and required parameters. Read this before calling novada_scrape to find the correct platform and operation for your use case.

skills.name: novada-agent
skills.description: Tool selection guide for 11 Novada MCP tools — decision tree, key parameters, common workflows (research+extract, competitive analysis, full site docs, fresh news, proxy setup), and when NOT to use each tool.

environmentVariables.name: NOVADA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Novada API key from https://www.novada.com
